title: No Wither Cheese
description: The Wither punishes attempts to bedrock trap it.
body:
Tired of players avoiding boss fights? Want to see the death count pile up in the chat while unsuspecting players accidentally unleash the Wither on the main end island? This pack is for you!
Makes the Wither suffocation immune by way of global powers, and if it detects being inside bedrock for too long, it'll explode and dash through it to the player.
